== Notes for [[Item:Q105647|Q105647]] ==

From ''Banu Khathm'' Tribe.

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): 40 AH (661 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asma_bint_Umays

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Ali

Source 3: http://www.balaghah.net/books/imam_ali/body_family_of_i1.html

Source 4: http://www.janathimessage.co.uk/AskTheImam/askimama.asp?qno=465
--------------------
From ''Banu Khathm'' Tribe.

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salma_bint_Umays

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asma_bint_Umays

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umays_ibn_Ma%27ad

Source 4: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hind_bint_Awf

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008457681508

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
